text.title: Competitor Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Competitor Analysis. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Matrix lists only direct SaaS competitors; misses Apple Notes (indirect) and ChatGPT (future).
antipattern.root-cause: Author over-trusted Product Hunt category filter.
antipattern.fix: Force include 3-5 indirect + 2-3 future, each with sourced concrete signal.

antipattern.symptom: Snapshot stops at homepage copy; pricing footnotes and 1-star reviews unread.
antipattern.fix: Always fetch pricing page + G2/Capterra 1-star reviews + Reddit thread per competitor.

antipattern.symptom: Funding figures inserted without Crunchbase citation.
antipattern.fix: If Crunchbase API unavailable, write 'unknown' - never estimate; mark any unverified number (est.).

antipattern.symptom: 5-star G2 score quoted as quality proof.
antipattern.fix: Cross-check with Reddit + Hacker News sentiment before quoting any rating.
